text: In the Name of Allah—the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.
All praise is for Allah—Lord of all worlds, <sup foot_note=1>1</sup>

foot_notes.1: i.e., Lord of everything in existence including angels, humans, and animals.

text: Master of the Day of Judgment.
You ˹alone˺ we worship and You ˹alone˺ we ask for help.
Guide us along the Straight Path,
the Path of those You have blessed—not those You are displeased with, or those who are astray. <sup foot_note=2>2</sup>

foot_notes.2: It is customary to say “ Âmîn ” or “Amen” at the end of this sûrah .
